boundedSticky: Desktop comments rail now uses sticky positioning inside the right sidebar instead of behaving as a viewport-owned fixed widget.
Comments-mode right sidebar now aligns the rail to the layout column edge and allows visible overflow for calmer column ownership.
Narrow layouts keep the fixed inset overlay path where the rail column is no longer available.
composerDockSlimming: Open footer dock padding and host chrome were reduced to remove the card-in-card feel.
Native host shell around #top-ce is lighter, calmer, and less vertically wasteful.
Iframe min-height was trimmed slightly without clipping native Blogger controls or legal content.
threadToggleTone: Thread toggle typography and contrast were reduced so it reads as secondary thread management.
Reply remains the primary conversational action.
More remains a quiet top-right utility.
avatarBorderSoftening: Top-level avatars were reduced slightly and border/background density was softened.
Comment dividers and nested thread rail lines were lightened to feel less utilitarian.
Reply/deleted context was softened further into editorial micro-meta.

acceptedNativeBloggerLimitations: The rail remains a visual/runtime enhancement over Blogger-native comments markup.
Open-comment compose fixtures remain unset, so compose-lane proof is explicit skip.
Native Blogger iframe internals remain treated as cross-origin UI; only the host shell, dock, and layout treatment were refined.
